title: Claude Code Skills: 98 AI architectures, Haiku at 93% of Fable 5 quality
abstract: Claude Code Skills: 98 AI architectures, crafting haikus at 93% of Fable 5 quality. Imagine telling your computer, "Generate some code snippets," and it pulls from 98 algorithms to produce powerful and poetic results that are both functional and artistic. It’s not just a tool; it’s your coding wizard!
abstract_zh: Claude Code Skills：98 种 AI 架构，连俳句都能写到像 Fable 5 的 93%！想象一下，你对着电脑说：“生成一个代码片段吧！”然后它就能调用 98 种算法，写出不仅功能强大还充满诗意的代码。这不仅仅是工具，简直是你的代码魔法师！
